item.title: is gonna be fuuuuuuuuuuun.
item.description: going to show him around my beautiful homecity, its not that old. buildt in 1560s, so its one of Norway's youngest cities. but it's stunning, old-towns a citadel, beautiful monument-library. etc.

item.title: I lost my wife of 30 years to cancer in 2021. Today I began a new journey with another beautiful soul.
item.description:
What a gorgeous day for a drive to the courthouse! And we took the Ford Torino that’s been driving people to weddings in my family since my mom bought it new in 1971. ?
I feel like the luckiest guy in the world to get a second chance with this beautiful woman.
item.dc:creator: UncleStansVintagePhotography

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 21
item.description:
(Edit because there's so much discourse about this one specifically: I think it does a good job at starting the conversation about how to better deal with long commute times.) Greetings! Happy Friday, to all who celebrate! I hope the unpleasant obligations go quickly, and you can get back to what you need.
Just gotta say that I'd love to be able to lay down and read. When you have glasses... You kinda can't.
Remind me to never do this.
This might help!
I am guilty of this.
Yep.
I mean. It's cute.
Bah-dum-tsss!
Ok, so this movie is a guilty pleasure of mine. Blair Witch 2: Book of Shadows. It's not a good movie haha. But I like watching it.
Mrglrglrglrgl!
Would be hilarious to hear.
It's true!
Get in the robot, Shinji!
... Yeah, I'll go for this.
:D
Basically, yeah.
This is cool.
Gotta keep the sand nailed down, we can't have sand fog everywhere.
Awwwww little pepper!!!
Some people really need practice!
Sigh.
This would be awesome.
I hope today is a gentle day for everyone. If it is not, I hope there are gentler times ahead. Also, reminder, you can click on an image and click the comment bubble to see what number an image is, and it even creates the link for you in the comment! #memes #memedump #meemays #funny #void
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: I had no idea she had passed. She left several messages here earlier on in her MD experience and then seemed to move over to instagram like some do when they have a story.
item.description: Seems like she was able to pass on her own terms. I had hoped it was as she wanted. #death
item.dc:creator: snowwhyyt

item.title: I like the way her voice changes when she says Baby.
item.dc:creator: downrightmike

item.title: Don't knock it 'til you've tried it.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: If you cultivate a mushroom in a petri bowl on agar agar, its actual ′′ shape ′′ becomes visible. The essential part of a mushroom, the Mycel, is usually hidden from our eye. What we perceive as a ′′ mushroom ′′ is only its transient fruit body.
item.description: "In my photo a piece of clean, living, flesh (the circle in the centre) has been taken directly from a young mushroom, placed onto nutrient rich agar, in order to expand its mycelium so it can be put into multiple new substrates, fully colonising and then eventually giving rise to (hopefully!) hundreds more fruit bodies . This plate has been left too long and the mycelial mat has matured, the linear rhizomorphic growth giving rise to hyphal knots (the tiny star like white dots) giving way to primordia (the tiny babies at the top left) who very very quickly (within a day or 2 depending on the species) turn into a full fruit body, who, within another few days will mature enough to release its own spores." Source: peggyfarmandforage on Instangram https://www.instagram.com/p/CMwXAitrcns/ #nature #mildlyinteresting #mushroom #agardish #fungi #science
item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: Something something blasphemy
item.description:
If you are, you're going to be upset... I would move along. Clearing out my phone of a few memes
In my post yesterday the big argument was that religion is the cause of morality. (https://imgur.com/gallery/uJtQf87) Apparently it was how religion you can't be empathetic they say.
My former step brother has stage 4 brain cancer. According to the former stepmother it's part of God's will. What a horrible way to justify somebody's suffering.
How many school shootings in the past few years?
Putting the fear of imaginary consequences into the youth is abhorrent
Delusions for me but not for the
Not to mention the sheer amount of hallucinogens that were taken in the time period
This would make a good bumper sticker
Story of Jesus abridged
And there was a party for him anyway so what did he lose
This is a fun one to ask Christians.
Talking to oneself is not mentally sound.
Really wish the majority of Christians would realize that they're the ones persecuting, judging, attacking others. And it's not the other way around. People are allowed to have an opinion. Just as people are allowed to follow their religion here in the United States. However, separation of church and state has been forgotten by those religious few. Anyway, I wanted to clear these out of my phone. Hope to hear what y'all have to say in the comments below
item.dc:creator: AnSquirrel
